app.name: Web3 Mental Health Assessment
app.disclaimer: This tool is for educational and research purposes only. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
app.sources: Based on: Taiwan MOHW, Taiwan NHRI, UK NHS, US NIMH
result.title: Your Results
result.recommendation: If you are experiencing significant distress, please consult a licensed mental health professional.
cognitive.title: Cognitive Distortions Checklist
cognitive.subtitle: Rate how often you experience each cognitive distortion (0 = Never, 10 = Always)
irrational.title: Irrational Beliefs Test
irrational.subtitle: Rate how much you agree with each belief (0 = Strongly Disagree, 10 = Strongly Agree)
summary.title: Assessment Summary
